name: Canva for Political Design
description: The go-to design tool for political campaigns that don't have a dedicated graphic designer. Create professional corflutes, how-to-vote cards, social media graphics, flyers, and email headers without design skills.
whyUseIt: Every campaign needs professional-looking visual materials. Canva makes it possible for anyone to create on-brand, consistent campaign collateral in minutes. Templates for political materials are available, and team sharing means volunteers can create approved content.
aiCapabilities: AI image generation, Magic Resize for multi-platform content, AI text suggestions, background removal
funnelPosition: Full funnel — awareness materials through to election day collateral
marketerWorkflow: Set up a brand kit (colours, fonts, logo), create templates for common materials, share with volunteer team via Canva Teams, produce materials for each week of the campaign
managerExpects: Consistent, on-brand materials produced quickly for every campaign event and social media post
demoDescription: Create a campaign brand kit, then use it to design a corflute, a social media announcement graphic, and a how-to-vote card — all visually consistent in under 30 minutes

vocabulary.definition: Corrugated plastic signs used at polling booths and on roadside during election campaigns
A card distributed at polling booths showing voters how to number candidates to direct their preferences

beginnerMistakes: Inconsistent branding across materials — use a brand kit
Creating materials that are too text-heavy — voters scan, they don't read
